gap_summaries.summary: test_classification_is_frozen caught generic Exception; tightened to dataclasses.FrozenInstanceError so unrelated AttributeError-style regressions fail the assertion.

Renamed test_failure_class_is_str_enum_subclass -> test_failure_class_is_enum_subclass: assertion checks Enum subclassing only; member value=name parity is already covered by test_failure_class_values_equal_member_names.

IMPLIES_GRAPH is a mutable module-level dict; types.MappingProxyType would prevent runtime mutation by downstream callers. Not applied because spec REQ-13 + the import-allowlist gate restrict imports to {enum, dataclasses, typing, collections.abc, core.telemetry_events, core.common}. types is not in the allowlist; expanding it needs operator approval. Mitigations already in place: Classification is frozen, implies tuples are immutable, FailureClass is a closed taxonomy.

full_suite.note: 21 pre-existing failures in test_stop_hooks (Windows path quoting in env-prefixed hook commands) — unrelated to M07a; present on the plan commit.
